interactions.summary: Jiang ends by posing the next class's problem: where the Yamnaya came from and why they were so successful in conquering Old Europe.

speaker_notes.note: Closing lecture transition by Jiang; no independent audience question appears in the segment.

claims.claim: The next lecture will explain the Yamnaya origin story and why they were successful in conquering Old Europe.

signature_moments.moment: The lost paradise ends as an unanswered conquest problem: what made the Yamnaya able to take Old Europe?
signature_moments.source_phrase: why were they so successful in conquering old Europe?

glossary_terms.definition_or_usage: The pre-conquest European civilization whose loss frames the lecture's Paradise Lost structure.
